tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glycemic control (prediabetes/early diabetes). Total CO₂ is slightly low, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensation. Platelet distribution width is elevated, possibly reflecting increased platelet size variability, but platelet count is normal. Other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and blood counts, are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and follow-up for glycemic control.
